hooks.command: cd /home/offlinebot/Coding/go/sem2 || exit 0; [ -d .git ] || exit 0; git add . 2>/dev/null; if git diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; F=.git/auto-commit-counter; N=$(cat "$F" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); N=$((N + 1)); echo "$N" > "$F"; git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit -m "$N" >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; git push >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
